title: aster julianus
intro: Aster julianus, also known as Michaelmas daisy or frost aster, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Aster julianus include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially exhibiting antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Aster julianus is often prepared as a tincture or infusion, and it can also be used in herbal teas and salves to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
